mapper.select:
SELECT n.STAFF_ID AS staffId, e.DEPT_ID AS deptId, e.NAME AS name, e.PHONE AS phone, e.EMAIL AS email, e.BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, e.GENDER_CODE AS genderCode, e.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, e.ADDRESS1 AS address1, e.ADDRESS2 AS address2, e.STATUS AS status,
n.LICENSE_NO AS licenseNo, n.NURSE_TYPE AS nurseType, n.SHIFT_TYPE AS shiftType, n.NURSE_FILE_URL AS nurseFileUrl, n.EDUCATION AS education, n.CAREER_DETAIL AS careerDetail, n.EXT_NO AS extNo FROM JCH.EMPLOYEE_NURSE n JOIN JCH.EMPLOYEE e ON e.STAFF_ID = n.STAFF_ID WHERE n.STAFF_ID = #{staffId}

SELECT n.STAFF_ID AS staffId, e.DEPT_ID AS deptId, e.NAME AS name, e.PHONE AS phone, e.EMAIL AS email, e.BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, e.GENDER_CODE AS genderCode, e.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, e.ADDRESS1 AS address1, e.ADDRESS2 AS address2, e.STATUS AS status,
n.LICENSE_NO AS licenseNo, n.NURSE_TYPE AS nurseType, n.SHIFT_TYPE AS shiftType, n.NURSE_FILE_URL AS nurseFileUrl, n.EDUCATION AS education, n.CAREER_DETAIL AS careerDetail, n.EXT_NO AS extNo
FROM JCH.EMPLOYEE_NURSE n JOIN JCH.EMPLOYEE e ON e.STAFF_ID = n.STAFF_ID

SELECT n.STAFF_ID AS staffId, e.DEPT_ID AS deptId, e.NAME AS name, e.PHONE AS phone, e.EMAIL AS email, e.BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, e.GENDER_CODE AS genderCode, e.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, e.ADDRESS1 AS address1, e.ADDRESS2 AS address2, e.STATUS AS status,
n.LICENSE_NO AS licenseNo, n.NURSE_TYPE AS nurseType, n.SHIFT_TYPE AS shiftType, n.NURSE_FILE_URL AS nurseFileUrl, n.EDUCATION AS education, n.CAREER_DETAIL AS careerDetail, n.EXT_NO AS extNo FROM JCH.EMPLOYEE_NURSE n JOIN JCH.EMPLOYEE e ON e.STAFF_ID = n.STAFF_ID
e.NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
n.STAFF_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
e.DEPT_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
n.SHIFT_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
n.EXT_NO LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
( e.NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR n.STAFF_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR e.DEPT_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR n.SHIFT_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR n.EXT_NO LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
ORDER BY n.STAFF_ID DESC
